title: A Classifier That Teaches Itself: Self-Improving, Frozen-gate Training (SIFT) for Dynamic Document Classification
summary: Document classification is a solved problem in the laboratory and an unsolved one in the enterprise. The blocker is rarely model architecture; it is the labeling project that must precede a model and the institutional fear of letting a model retrain itself once one exists. We present SIFT (Self-Improving, Frozen-gate Training), a dynamic classifier service, which attacks both. SIFT serves classification from a deliberately cheap, CPU-bound pipeline, a SPLADE sparse encoder feeding a LightGBM head, and escalates only the low-confidence minority of pages to an LLM judge. The judge's verdicts are written back into a labeled corpus, so the expensive model continuously teaches the cheap one: the escalation rate falls, the corpus grows from production traffic rather than from an up-front annotation effort, and accuracy compounds with use. Onboarding a new document family requires only a declarative bundle, label space, anchor phrases, and a judge glossary, not a labeling project. The harder problem is safety: an autonomously retraining classifier can silently regress. SIFT resolves this with a two-part promote gate, a critical-label F1 regression check plus a frozen golden regression set the model is never trained on, either of which vetoes promotion. This turns "retrain monthly without a human" from reckless into routine. We describe the architecture, the self-feeding corpus loop, the frozen-gate promotion mechanism, and an illustrative multi-domain deployment, and we discuss the economics of a classifier whose marginal labeling cost trends toward zero.

AI.tldr: SIFT提出了一种自训练动态分类服务框架，通过廉价管道（SPLADE+LightGBM）处理大部分查询并将低置信度样本升级至LLM裁判，利用裁判反馈自主扩充标注语料库，同时引入双门控机制（关键标签F1回归检测+冻结黄金回归集）防止模型静默退化，从而实现在无需人工标注项目的前提下分类器准确度随使用持续提升。
AI.motivation: 文档分类在实验环境中已得到解决，但在企业部署中面临两大阻碍：一是训练模型前需要昂贵的标注项目，二是机构对模型自主重训练导致性能退化的担忧。现有方法依赖前期人工标注，且缺乏安全的自动化持续学习机制。
AI.method: SIFT采用双阶段架构：第一阶段使用廉价的CPU友好型管道，由SPLADE稀疏编码器配合LightGBM分类头构成，处理绝大多数页面；第二阶段仅将低置信度的少数页面升级至高成本的LLM裁判进行判断。LLM的判定结果写回标注语料库，使昂贵模型持续教导廉价模型，从而降低升级率并自动增长语料库。安全方面设计了双部分promote门控机制：关键标签F1回归检查+冻结黄金回归集（模型从未训练过的数据），任一条件不满足即否决模型更新。
AI.result: SIFT实现了分类器边际标注成本趋近于零的目标：语料库来自生产流量而非前期标注，准确度随使用持续累积提升。新文档家族的接入仅需声明式配置（标签空间、锚定短语和裁判词汇表），无需标注项目。双门控机制将"每月无人监督重训练"从鲁莽行为转变为常规操作。
AI.conclusion: SIFT通过自反馈语料循环和冻结门控机制，解决了企业级文档分类中标注成本和自动化安全退化的核心矛盾，提供了一种边际标注成本趋零的经济性方案。该架构表明，在合理安全约束下，分类器可以在生产环境中实现安全、自主的持续学习。

title: The Story Shapes the Agent: Narrative Priors in LLM Behavior
comment: Accepted at COLM 2026. 10 pages, 3 figures, 16 tables in appendix
summary: Persona prompting is widely used to steer LLM agent behavior, yet the narrative framing of a task can matter more than the assigned persona. We isolate this effect through structural isomorphism, constructing three text-based investigation games that share the same action space, stage progression, and resource constraints while varying only task narrative: disease investigation, IT troubleshooting, and murder mystery. Across 1,890 sessions spanning 3 models and 10 personas, we identify narrative priors: systematic action tendencies activated by a task's story framing, independent of its decision structure. Narrative priors explain 5-31x more behavioral variance than persona, are consistent across model architectures, and in two of three domains are negatively associated with task success. Persona effects that do transfer across narratives arise from behavioral anchors, persona descriptions whose language maps directly onto shared actions. Causal interventions confirm this: removing anchor words from a high-transfer persona reduces cross-narrative consistency by 95%. Our framework also generalizes to a held-out fourth narrative and yields a persona-selection method that improves cross-narrative transfer. These results suggest that LLM behavior that survives narrative changes should be grounded in concrete actions rather than abstract descriptions.

AI.tldr: 本文发现，在LLM智能体行为中，任务叙述框架（叙事先验）对行为变异的影响远大于预设角色（persona），并通过结构同构实验和因果干预验证了这一现象，表明跨叙事迁移的行为应基于具体动作而非抽象描述。
AI.motivation: 现有研究广泛使用角色提示（persona prompting）来引导LLM智能体行为，但任务叙述框架对行为的影响程度及其与角色效应的关系尚不明确，缺乏对二者相对贡献的系统性量化研究。
AI.method: 通过结构同构设计，构建了三个共享相同动作空间、阶段进度和资源约束的文本型调查游戏（疾病调查、IT故障排查、凶杀谜案），在3个模型、10种角色设定下进行1,890轮实验，并采用因果干预（移除锚定词）和角色选择方法验证叙事先验的因果作用及跨叙事迁移机制。
AI.result: 叙事先验对行为变异的解释能力是角色效应的5-31倍，且在三个领域中的两个领域与任务成功率呈负相关；跨叙事迁移的角色效应源于行为锚定（persona描述中映射到共享动作的语言），移除锚定词后跨叙事一致性降低95%。
AI.conclusion: LLM行为中真正稳定跨叙事迁移的应基于具体动作而非抽象角色描述，提出了一种提升跨叙事迁移的角色选择方法，并验证了该框架在第四个未见过的叙事上的泛化能力。

title: Stochastic Meta-Unlearning: Bridging Language Backbone and Multimodal Unlearning
summary: Machine unlearning for vision-language models (VLMs) remains underexplored. Unlike language models, VLMs combine a language backbone with visual components, which makes unlearning more complex. There is a surprising phenomenon when moving from single-modality unlearning to VLM unlearning: a target forgotten by the standalone language backbone can still be recovered when image information is given to the full VLM. This shows that text-only feedback is not enough for reliable VLM unlearning. Motivated by this observation, we propose Stochastic Meta-Unlearning (SMU), a bilevel framework that uses VLM-level feedback to learn an unlearning-ready initialization. In the inner loop, SMU applies a few unlearning steps to the language backbone using text data. In the outer loop, SMU recomposes the updated backbone with the frozen VLM and evaluates forgetting and utility at the VLM level. This design makes the unlearning update aware of the final multimodal behavior, while still keeping the update local to the language backbone. Experiments on two VLMs, two multimodal meme datasets, and three baselines show that SMU achieves the best overall forget-retain trade-off. Compared with the strongest baseline for each metric, SMU reduces average Forget accuracy by 10.52 points and improves average Retain and Test accuracy by 20.10 and 17.01 points, respectively. More importantly, SMU also transfers to new forgetting targets and to different meta-test unlearning methods. These results suggest that VLM-level feedback can make language-backbone unlearning more reliable and more transferable for VLMs.

AI.tldr: 提出随机元遗忘（SMU）框架，利用双层优化在VLM级别引入多模态反馈，使语言主干能够学习遗忘初始化，从而实现更可靠、可迁移的多模态遗忘。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言模型（VLM）的遗忘问题尚未被充分探索。与纯语言模型不同，VLM结合了语言主干和视觉组件，使得遗忘更加复杂。研究发现，一个在单独语言主干中被遗忘的目标，在给定图像信息后可以在完整VLM中被恢复，表明仅依赖文本反馈无法实现可靠的VLM遗忘。
AI.method: 提出随机元遗忘（Stochastic Meta-Unlearning, SMU），一个双层优化框架。内循环在语言主干上使用文本数据进行少量遗忘步骤；外循环将更新后的主干与冻结的VLM重新组合，在VLM层面评估遗忘效果和保持能力。该方法使得遗忘更新能感知最终的多模态行为，同时仅对语言主干进行局部更新。
AI.result: 在两个VLM、两个多模态模因数据集和三个基线上的实验表明，SMU实现了最优的遗忘-保持权衡。与每个指标的最强基线相比，SMU将平均遗忘准确率降低10.52点，将平均保持准确率和测试准确率分别提升20.10和17.01点。SMU还能迁移到新的遗忘目标和不同的元测试遗忘方法上。
AI.conclusion: VLM级别的反馈可以使语言主干的遗忘操作更加可靠且更具可迁移性。SMU验证了在多模态场景下利用完整VLM反馈指导局部更新是实现有效遗忘的关键思路。

title: Fusion Embedding: A Unified Embedding Space for Text, Image, Video, and Audio
summary: A single embedding space that covers text, images, video, and audio lets one index serve every query a user can pose. Embedding models built on vision-language backbones now lead text/image/video retrieval benchmarks but lack audio entirely, while audio-text retrieval is led by specialist systems that serve no other modality. We present the Fusion Embedding family, which adds audio to a frozen vision-language embedding base whose parameters are never updated: generation 1 (fusion-embedding-1) trains only a 16.4M-parameter connector between a frozen audio tower and the frozen base, and generation 2 (fusion-embedding-2) adds modality-gated deep adapters (44.2M parameters) whose branch never executes on text, image, or video inputs: their outputs are bit-for-bit those of the released base, verified after every training run. Because the base already binds text, images, and video, aligning audio to text alone makes audio-image retrieval emerge, with zero paired audio-visual training data. Alongside the recipe we map its design space with controlled negative results (rewriting training captions with an LLM, substituting a leaderboard-stronger audio tower, and widening the connector each reduce retrieval) and with training-protocol findings that we expect to transfer to any frozen decoder-LM embedding backbone. Both generations train in hours on a single GPU. Weights, code, and the evaluation harness are openly released.

AI.tldr: 提出Fusion Embedding系列模型，通过在冻结的视觉-语言嵌入基座上增加音频模态，实现了文本、图像、视频与音频的统一多模态嵌入空间，仅需单GPU数小时训练即可完成。
AI.motivation: 现有嵌入模型在文本、图像、视频检索上表现领先但完全缺乏音频模态，而音频-文本检索系统由专用模型主导且无法支持其他模态，缺乏一个能够统一覆盖所有模态的单一嵌入空间。
AI.method: 基于冻结的视觉-语言嵌入基座（参数永不更新），第一代模型仅训练一个16.4M参数的连接器将音频塔与基座对齐；第二代模型引入44.2M参数的模态门控深度适配器，该分支在文本、图像、视频输入下完全不执行，保证输出与基座完全一致。
AI.result: 仅通过对齐音频与文本即可零样本涌现出音频-图像检索能力，无需任何成对的音频-视觉训练数据；用LLM重写训练描述、替换更强音频塔、加宽连接器等操作反而降低检索性能；模型在单GPU上数小时即可完成训练。
AI.conclusion: 该工作提供了一个高效、开放的多模态嵌入统一方案，并给出了可迁移至冻结解码器-语言模型嵌入骨干的设计空间结论与训练协议经验。

title: Rationale-Guided Knowledge Distillation for Cross-Lingual Stance Detection
summary: Stance detection aims to identify whether a text expresses a favorable or opposing attitude toward a given target, and serves as an important task for various downstream applications. Although existing studies have achieved strong performance in monolingual settings, especially in English, many low-resource languages such as Catalan still lack sufficient annotated data for training effective models. Cross-lingual stance detection alleviates this problem by transferring stance knowledge from resource-rich languages to low-resource languages. However, most existing methods mainly rely on semantic alignment between texts and targets, while ignoring the reasoning process required for reliable stance inference. Although Large Language Models provide strong reasoning ability, their high computational cost and inference latency limit practical deployment. To address these limitations, we propose a rationale-guided knowledge distillation framework for cross-lingual stance detection. Specifically, we use Chain-of-Thought prompting to guide Large Language Models in generating informative rationales, and distill the resulting reasoning knowledge into a compact student model. We further design a dual-path distillation mechanism to align rationale-enhanced and rationale-free representations, together with their prediction distributions. In addition, two contrastive learning strategies are introduced to improve stance discrimination. Experiments on multilingual benchmarks demonstrate that our method consistently outperforms competitive baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于推理引导的知识蒸馏框架，利用大语言模型的链式思维推理生成解释性理由，并将其蒸馏到轻量级学生模型中，以高效实现跨语言立场检测。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言立场检测方法主要依赖文本与目标之间的语义对齐，忽略了立场推理所需的推理过程；大语言模型虽具备强推理能力，但其高计算成本和推理延迟限制了实际部署，而低资源语言（如加泰罗尼亚语）缺乏足够的标注数据。
AI.method: 提出推理引导的知识蒸馏框架：首先使用链式思维提示引导大语言模型生成蕴含推理过程的解释性理由，然后将推理知识蒸馏到紧凑的学生模型中；设计双路径蒸馏机制，同时对齐理由增强与理由无关的表征及预测分布；引入两种对比学习策略以提升立场判别能力。
AI.result: 在多语言基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在跨语言立场检测任务上持续优于多个竞争基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过蒸馏大语言模型的推理能力到小型模型，可以在保持高效推理的同时显著提升跨语言立场检测性能，为低资源场景下的立场检测提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Find Before You Fine-Tune: A Diagnostic Study of Small LLMs for Cybersecurity QA
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly fine-tuned for critical-domain Question-Answering (QA), yet choosing which small model to adapt, before paying the cost of adaptation, remains difficult. Fine-tuning can improve domain alignment, but it may also erode prior knowledge, weaken instruction-following, or increase hallucination, especially when labeled data are scarce or rapidly evolving as in cybersecurity. We present FiT (Find before Fine-Tune), a task-oriented diagnostic framework that characterizes small LLMs along three capabilities required for cybersecurity QA: vocabulary recognition, parametric knowledge, and contextualization of retrieved information. Using FiT, we conduct an empirical study of five open-weight 7-billion-parameter models under two fine-tuning regimes. We find that fine-tuning does not uniformly help: it consistently degrades vocabulary and parametric knowledge in small models, and the two regimes trade off differently. Knowledge-focused tuning causes moderate, rank-preserving degradation, whereas instruction-focused tuning collapses measured knowledge through induced abstention, inverting the knowledge ranking while leaving retrieval-grounded contextualization essentially intact. We quantify these regime-specific patterns with rank-correlation analysis and show that pre-fine-tuning FiT scores anticipate the direction of post-tuning change. Our results suggest that task-oriented diagnosis can screen out unsuitable models, avoid unnecessary fine-tuning, and support safer deployment of small LLMs in cybersecurity QA pipelines.

AI.tldr: FiT提出了一种任务导向的诊断框架，在微调前评估小语言模型在网络安全QA中的词汇识别、参数知识和检索信息上下文化三种能力，发现微调往往非但无益反而会退化前两种能力，且不同微调范式对能力的影响模式存在系统性差异。
AI.motivation: 在将LLMs微调用于网络安全等关键领域问答时，选择哪种小模型进行适配非常困难，因为微调可能侵蚀先验知识、削弱指令遵循或增加幻觉，尤其在标注数据稀缺且快速演变的场景下问题更为突出；现有研究缺乏在微调前系统诊断模型任务适配性的方法。
AI.method: 提出FiT（Find before Fine-Tune）框架，从词汇识别、参数知识和检索信息上下文化三种能力维度表征小LLM对网络安全QA的适应性，并在五种7B参数规模的开源模型上，分别在知识聚焦和指令聚焦两种微调范式下进行实证研究，利用秩相关分析量化微调前后的能力变化模式。
AI.result: 微调对所有小模型的词汇识别和参数知识能力均造成持续退化；知识聚焦微调导致中等程度且保持排序的退化，而指令聚焦微调通过诱导模型拒绝回答使参数知识几乎崩溃并逆转知识排名，但对检索信息上下文化能力基本无损；微调前的FiT评分可预测微调后的变化方向。
AI.conclusion: 任务导向的微调前诊断能够筛选出不合适的模型，避免不必要的微调成本，并为小LLM在网络安全QA pipeline中的更安全部署提供支持；不同微调范式对模型能力维度的影响存在系统性差异，需要在应用时仔细权衡。

title: RF-Agent: A Practical Framework for Building Language Agents for RFIC Design
comment: Accepted at ICLAD (IEEE International Conference on LLM-Aided Design), 2026
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have driven rapid progress in electronic design automation (EDA), yet their application to radio-frequency (RF) circuit design remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific datasets and standardized benchmarks. We present RF-Agent, which addresses this gap through textbook-driven knowledge distillation. A multi-agent Question-Thinking-Solution-Answer (QTSA) pipeline converts a subsection-level corpus from seven canonical RF textbooks into the first-of-its-kind RF-domain reasoning dataset (over 11,000 samples) with a dedicated multiple-choice benchmark. On this benchmark we study two adaptation strategies: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and three retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) configurations (semantic, keyword, hybrid). Across multiple LLM families, domain-specific SFT significantly improves RF reasoning, especially for small and medium-sized models; among RAG configurations, semantic retrieval performs best, indicating embedding-based context alignment suits RF reasoning better than naive fusion. The dataset and benchmark provide a reusable foundation for future work on LLM-aided RF circuit design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RF-Agent，通过教科书驱动的知识蒸馏和多智能体QTSA流程构建首个RF领域推理数据集（超11,000样本）与多项选择题基准，实验表明领域专用微调显著提升小/中型模型的RF推理能力，且语义检索在RAG中表现最优。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在电子设计自动化中进展迅速，但射频电路设计领域因缺乏专用数据集和标准化基准而应用受限。
AI.method: 提出RF-Agent框架，采用教科书驱动的知识蒸馏策略，设计多智能体Question-Thinking-Solution-Answer (QTSA)流程，从七本经典RF教科书的子节级语料中自动构建RF领域推理数据集（超11,000样本）及多项选择基准，并研究了监督微调（SFT）和三种检索增强生成（RAG）配置（语义、关键词、混合）两种适应策略。
AI.result: 在多个LLM家族上的实验表明，领域专用SFT显著提升了RF推理能力，尤其对小/中型模型效果明显；在RAG配置中，语义检索表现最佳，说明基于嵌入的上下文对齐比朴素融合更适合RF推理任务。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集和基准为未来LLM辅助RF电路设计研究提供了可复用的基础，揭示了领域专用微调和语义检索策略在RF推理中的有效性。

title: HPD-Parsing: Hierarchical Parallel Document Parsing
summary: Efficient teamwork typically combines global coordination with parallel execution, a principle not yet fully reflected in unified Vision-Language Model (VLM)-based document parsers. Existing unified parsers process an entire page jointly but generate its output through a single token-by-token autoregressive trajectory, creating a sequential bottleneck that grows with document length. Such full-page sequential generation overlooks a key property of document parsing: layout must be analyzed globally, whereas block content can be parsed in parallel. Based on this observation, we introduce HPD-Parsing, which replaces full-page autoregressive generation with a Hierarchical Parallel Decoding paradigm. A main layout branch organizes the overall document structure and dynamically assigns block-level content decoding to concurrent branches, while progressive multi-token prediction (P-MTP) further reduces the decoding steps within each branch. Experiments on public benchmarks show that HPD-Parsing achieves 4,752 tokens per second, delivering $2.62\times$ the throughput of the fastest existing document parsing model and $3.06\times$ that of the vanilla autoregressive baseline, while maintaining competitive parsing accuracy. These results establish hierarchical parallel decoding as an effective alternative to full-page autoregressive generation, opening a new direction for efficient unified document parsing.

AI.tldr: HPD-Parsing提出一种层次化并行解码范式，将文档解析分解为全局布局分析与块级内容并行生成，替换全页自回归生成，在保持竞争性解析精度的同时实现4,752 tokens/s的吞吐量，分别达到现有最快模型和普通自回归基线的2.62倍和3.06倍。
AI.motivation: 现有统一的基于VLM的文档解析器虽然能够联合处理整页输入，但其输出生成方式仍采用逐token的自回归轨迹，形成随文档长度增长的序列化瓶颈，未能充分利用文档解析中布局需全局分析而块内容可并行解析这一关键特性。
AI.method: HPD-Parsing采用层次化并行解码范式，主布局分支负责全局文档结构组织并动态分配块级内容解码任务给并发子分支，同时引入渐进式多token预测（P-MTP）进一步减少每个分支内的解码步骤，从而替代全页自回归生成。
AI.result: 在公开基准上，HPD-Parsing达到每秒4,752个token的吞吐量，比现有最快文档解析模型快2.62倍，比普通自回归基线快3.06倍，同时保持具有竞争力的解析准确率。
AI.conclusion: 层次化并行解码被证明是全页自回归生成的有效替代方案，为高效的统一文档解析开辟了新方向。

title: Content is What Remains: Invariant Speech Tokenization from Parallel Utterances
summary: Discrete speech tokenizers aim to disentangle semantic from acoustic information, yet targets from self-supervised learning (SSL) models like HuBERT retain non-linguistic variation: speaker identity, prosody, and channel conditions leak into the tokens, inflating entropy. Our key insight is that when enough speakers utter the same words under varying conditions, linguistic content is the only shared factor. We propose PINT (Parallel INvariant Tokenization), which fine-tunes an SSL encoder with alignment losses across parallel utterances and augmentations to distill this shared residual. PINT collapses identical words onto consistent token sequences, drastically reducing conditional entropy. Unlike ASR text, PINT tokens preserve frame-level temporal grounding and serve as drop-in semantic targets for audio codecs. Experiments show a 98.7% relative reduction in speaker probe accuracy (93.1% to 1.2%), a 42% lower ABX error rate, and 27-30% lower LM perplexity versus baselines, confirming that the right invariance is key to efficient learning.

AI.tldr: PINT是一种并行不变性标记化方法，通过对齐平行语料和增强数据来微调SSL编码器，能够从语音中分离出语义内容、去除说话人身份等非语言变化，生成语义纯净、时间对齐的离散语音标记。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自监督学习模型（如HuBERT）的离散语音标记化虽旨在分离语义与声学信息，但标记中仍保留说话人身份、韵律和信道条件等非语言变化，导致信息熵过高，影响下游语义学习效率。
AI.method: PINT通过利用平行语料（不同说话人表述相同词句）和增强数据，引入对齐损失对SSL编码器进行微调，使模型学习到唯一共享的语义内容因子，从而将相同单词压缩为一致的标记序列，同时保留帧级时间对齐能力，可作为音频编解码器的即插即用语义目标。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，PINT在说话人探针准确率上从93.1%降至1.2%（相对降低98.7%），ABX错误率降低42%，语言模型困惑度降低27-30%，全面优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实，去除非语言变化的关键在于引入正确的不变性约束，相较于ASR文本，PINT标记保留了更好的时间粒度，为高效语音语义学习提供了新范式。

title: Reasoning Before Translation: Enhancing Legal Machine Translation with Structured Reasoning
summary:
Neural machine translation (NMT) in the legal domain is a linguistically and conceptually demanding task, primarily due to the complexity of legal language and the high level of precision it requires. The recent emergence of reasoning-capable language models opens new possibilities for tackling such challenges. They add to a set of other previously proposed techniques to enhance the translation quality, which includes supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning.
  In this work, we perform a comparison between these various approaches. More particularly, we evaluate small language models such as Qwen3.5 4B, Qwen3.5 9B, and Gemma 3 12B enhanced with various re-training paradigms and compare their performances against frontier reasoning models. We focus on the Swiss legal system, which -- with its unique multilingual statutes -- offers a particularly challenging testbed for reasoning-augmented models. Our results show that the quality of small ``base'' models can be greatly enhanced, and that reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards can be applied to NMT in the legal domain and surpasses the translation quality of supervised fine-tuning. The performance of enhanced small models is close to the one of state-of-the-art reasoning models yet remains inferior. We also note that re-training paradigms yield diminishing returns as model size increase. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/aixiuxiuxiu/Legal-MT-SFT-RL.

AI.tldr: 对法律领域神经机器翻译中多种增强范式进行系统比较，发现带可验证奖励的强化学习优于监督微调，小型基础模型经增强后性能接近但不及前沿推理模型，且重训练范式随模型规模增大会出现收益递减。
AI.motivation: 法律领域的神经机器翻译因法律语言的复杂性和高精度要求而极具挑战性；尽管已有监督微调和强化学习等增强技术，且近期涌现出具备推理能力的大语言模型，但针对这些不同方法在专业法律翻译任务上的系统比较研究仍然不足。
AI.method: 以瑞士多语言法律体系为测试场景，对Qwen3.5 4B、Qwen3.5 9B和Gemma 3 12B等小型语言模型采用监督微调和带可验证奖励的强化学习等重训练范式进行增强，并与前沿推理模型的翻译性能进行对比。
AI.result: 小型基础模型的质量可通过重训练范式大幅提升；带可验证奖励的强化学习在法律NMT上优于监督微调；增强后的小模型性能接近但尚未超越前沿推理模型；重训练范式随模型规模增大会出现收益递减。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习在专业法律翻译任务中展现出优于监督微调的潜力，但小型模型仍无法完全匹敌大型推理模型；模型规模与重训练收益之间存在权衡关系，提示未来研究需在模型规模和增强策略之间寻找最优平衡点。

title: Hazard or Anomaly? Evaluating VLMs for Understanding Dangers and Discrepancies
summary: Modern safety-critical systems increasingly rely on human-robot interaction to reduce disaster risk and support decision-making during emergencies. Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are promising for these settings because they can interpret complex scenes and communicate safety-relevant information, but they still require careful evaluation to ensure reliable safety reasoning. In particular, current evaluations often frame danger recognition as a binary decision (Safe/Unsafe), making it unclear whether a model is identifying true physical hazards or merely reacting to unusual scene elements. We address this limitation by introducing an explicit distinction between hazard and anomaly, and by separately recognizing hazardous and anomalous states. We evaluate several state-of-the-art VLMs across two datasets and multiple prompting strategies to test whether this distinction changes model behavior. Our results show that VLMs frequently misinterpret anomalousness as hazardousness, revealing an over-reliance on contextual irregularity as a proxy for danger. We further show that explicitly separating anomaly from hazard provides a more informative evaluation of VLM safety reasoning and exposes failure modes that binary safety judgments can obscure. Our public dataset is available on Roboflow https://app.roboflow.com/vlm-in-context-anomaly-and-hazard-detection/camera-ready-roman-ds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将危险（hazard）与异常（anomaly）明确区分，以改进视觉语言模型（VLM）在安全推理中的评估；实验表明VLM常将异常性误判为危险性，二元安全判断掩盖了此类失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM安全评估将危险识别建模为二元决策（安全/不安全），无法区分模型是真正识别物理危险还是仅对场景中的异常元素做出反应，因此需要更精细的评估框架来揭示VLM安全推理的真实能力与局限性。
AI.method: 引入危险（hazard）与异常（anomaly）的显式概念区分，分别识别危险状态和异常状态；在多个数据集上采用多种提示策略评估多种主流VLM，测试该区分是否改变模型行为。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，VLM经常将异常性误判为危险性，表明模型过度依赖上下文不规则性作为危险的代理指标；显式分离异常与危险能提供更信息化的安全推理评估，并暴露出二元安全判断所掩盖的失败模式。
AI.conclusion: 将危险与异常明确分离是一种更有效的VLM安全推理评估方法，能够揭示模型以异常性替代危险性的系统性偏差，为构建更可靠的人机交互安全系统提供评估依据。

title: MIRA-Ev:A Benchmark for Granular Evidence Detection and Relational Reasoning in Clinical Exams
summary: Clinical NLP evaluation remains dominated by multiple-choice question answering (MCQA), which scores only final-answer accuracy and cannot detect when a model reaches the correct diagnosis while grounding it in irrelevant, absent, or contradictory evidence. We introduce MIRA-Ev, a clinical argument mining benchmark built on Spanish Médico Interno Residente (MIR) licensing-exam cases, re-annotated by expert clinicians with span-level premises, claims, and directed support/attack relations, and released in parallel Spanish (native), English, and Basque versions, the first clinical argumentation resource in Basque. MIRA-Ev organizes evaluation into a three-tier task hierarchy: evidence sentence retrieval, argumentative component extraction, and relation classification.

AI.tldr: MIRA-Ev 是一个基于西班牙 MIR 执业医师考试病例的临床论点挖掘基准，由专家临床医生重新标注了 span 级别的前提、主张和 directed 支持/攻击关系，并提供西班牙语、英语和巴斯克语三种版本，将评估组织为三级任务层次结构（证据句子检索、论点成分抽取、关系分类）。
AI.motivation: 临床 NLP 评估长期被多项选择问答（MCQA）主导，这种方式仅对最终答案正确性进行评分，无法检测模型是否在基于不相关、缺失或矛盾的证据时仍得出正确诊断，缺乏对模型推理依据的细粒度评估能力。
AI.method: 基于西班牙 Médico Interno Residente (MIR) 执业医师考试病例，由专家临床医生重新标注 span 级的前提、主张和 directed 支持/攻击关系，构建了平行西班牙语（原生）、英语和巴斯克语版本（首个巴斯克语临床论点资源），并设计了三层任务层次结构：证据句子检索、论点成分抽取和关系分类。
AI.result: 发布了 MIRA-Ev 基准数据集，包含多语言平行版本（西班牙语、英语、巴斯克语），构建了三级任务评估体系，具体性能指标待论文正文详述。
AI.conclusion: MIRA-Ev 超越了传统 MCQA 的局限，通过细粒度的论点挖掘任务实现了对临床 NLP 模型推理依据的结构化评估，为多语言临床论点分析提供了新的基准资源，特别首次引入了巴斯克语临床论证数据。

title: Recti-Q: Feature-Space Rectification for Out-of-Distribution-Robust Quantized Perception in Edge Robotics
comment: Accepted at the 2026 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: Robotic perception pipelines increasingly rely on large vision backbones deployed on SWaP-constrained edge platforms, making post-training quantization (PTQ) attractive for real-time inference. However, while PTQ often preserves clean in-distribution accuracy, we show that it can substantially degrade reliability under deployment-relevant distribution shifts (e.g., sensor noise, severe weather, and novel operating environments), creating a Quantization-Induced Robustness Gap. Across foundational vision benchmarks (ImageNet-C and PACS), 4-bit PTQ models exhibit pronounced robustness degradation despite negligible ID accuracy loss. To address this, we propose Recti-Q, a lightweight feature-space rectification framework that freezes the quantized backbone and trains a small classifier-head LoRA adapter using only source data. Recti-Q is architecture-agnostic across CNNs and Transformers, supports efficient teacher-free training, and recovers a significant portion of the lost robustness, in some cases matching or exceeding FP32 performance. At less than 1% parameter overhead (as small as 6 KB), Recti-Q preserves over 99% of PTQ memory savings, adds negligible compute, and enables low-bandwidth Over-The-Air (OTA) resilience patching for deployed robotic fleets operating in unpredictable physical environments.

AI.tldr: 该论文揭示了后训练量化（PTQ）在分布偏移下会显著降低模型鲁棒性（量化诱导鲁棒性差距），并提出Recti-Q，一种轻量级特征空间修正框架，通过在量化骨干网络冻结条件下训练小型分类头LoRA适配器，以极小参数开销恢复大部分丢失的鲁棒性，支持OTA弹性补丁部署。
AI.motivation: 机器人感知流水线在SWaP受限的边缘平台上依赖大型视觉骨干网络，PTQ虽能实现实时推理且在干净分布上精度损失微小，但在实际部署中遭遇传感器噪声、恶劣天气及陌生环境等分布偏移时，量化模型显著丧失鲁棒性，现有研究对此问题缺乏系统性分析和有效解决方案。
AI.method: 提出Recti-Q框架：冻结量化后的骨干网络，仅训练一个轻量级的分类头LoRA适配器，无需教师网络，仅使用源域数据进行训练。该方法架构无关，适用于CNN和Transformer，训练高效且支持低带宽的OTA鲁棒性补丁更新。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-C和PACS基准上，4-bit PTQ在分布偏移下鲁棒性严重退化，而Recti-Q以不到1%的参数开销（最小6 KB）恢复大部分鲁棒性损失，部分场景下甚至匹配或超越FP32性能，同时保留PTQ超过99%的内存节省，计算开销可忽略。
AI.conclusion: PTQ在分布偏移下的鲁棒性退化是一个关键但被忽视的问题；Recti-Q以极低成本有效弥补该鲁棒性差距，为部署在不可预测物理环境中的机器人编队提供了一种实用的、可OTA更新的鲁棒性增强方案，且不牺牲PTQ的存储和计算优势。

title: Inference-Time Steering for Cross-Lingual Factual Consistency in LLMs
comment: 8 pages (21 in total), 2 figures, 4 tables. Original manuscript for a Guided Research project conducted at the Technical University of Munich, detailing the complete methodology, full data pipeline, and comprehensive experimental results. A related, condensed subset of this work was subsequently adapted and published at the StereACuLT 2026 workshop
summary: Although Large Language Models (LLMs) demonstrate remarkable multilingual fluency, their internal knowledge representations remain disproportionately biased toward high-resource languages. This leads to cross-lingual factual inconsistency, where they shift their empirical answer distributions based solely on the prompt language. We investigate whether these biases can be mitigated at inference time, forcing an English-prompted model to answer as if it were queried in target languages (German, Spanish, Bulgarian), and evaluate four intervention strategies: zero-shot contextual steering (persona prompting), internal representation manipulation via Contrastive Activation Addition (CAA), and lightweight weight modification via Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) trained on benchmark-derived factual data as well as conceptual generalization data. To assess alignment, we curate a multilingual factual dataset alongside a novel generalization benchmark comprising culturally rooted queries to determine whether factual interventions transfer to broader target-centric preferences. Experiments on Gemma 3 12B Instruct reveal persona prompting to be the strongest overall intervention, balancing efficacy, safety, and out-of-domain generalization. While CAA yields sharp inconsistency benchmark shifts, it is configuration-sensitive and risks knowledge degradation. DPO-based adapters offer permanent, yet narrower and less transferable gains. These findings suggest that cross-lingual inconsistency is at least partly a selection problem, and that simple contextual interventions may outperform more invasive methods for robust, transferable alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了大型语言模型中的跨语言事实不一致性问题，发现通过简单的零样本上下文引导（角色提示）即可有效缓解该问题，其效果优于内部表示操控（对比激活添加）和轻量级权重调整（基于DPO的适配器），表明跨语言不一致本质上是一个选择问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型尽管表现出多语言流畅性，但其内部知识表征严重偏向高资源语言，导致跨语言事实不一致，即模型仅因提示语言不同而改变答案分布。现有研究对此问题的缓解方法缺乏系统性对比，尤其在推理时干预策略的有效性尚不明确。
AI.method: 本文在Gemma 3 12B Instruct上对比了四种推理时干预策略：零样本上下文引导（角色提示）、内部表示操控（对比激活添加CAA）、基于基准事实数据训练的轻量级权重修改（DPO），以及基于概念泛化数据的DPO训练。同时构建了多语言事实数据集和包含文化根基查询的新型泛化基准，用于评估干预策略在不同目标语言（德语、西班牙语、保加利亚语）上的对齐效果和迁移能力。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，角色提示是最强的整体干预策略，在有效性、安全性和领域外泛化之间取得了最佳平衡。CAA在一致性基准上产生显著变化，但对配置敏感且存在知识退化风险。基于DPO的适配器提供了永久性调整，但收益范围较窄且迁移性较差。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言不一致问题至少部分是一个选择问题，简单的上下文干预策略在实现鲁棒且可迁移的对齐方面可能优于更侵入性的方法。该发现对多语言LLM的事实一致性改进具有重要的实践指导意义。

title: Attention Without Grounding: Causal Evaluation of Visual Explanations in Medical VLMs
summary: Attention and saliency heatmaps are widely used to explain medical Vision-Language Model (VLM) outputs on chest X-rays, yet whether they truly highlight the image evidence driving predictions has not been causally tested. We audit faithfulness via overlap with radiologist bounding boxes on PadChest (n=637), attribution mass within radiologist masks on CheXlocalize (n=643), and 16x16 patch-occlusion maps that record which regions, when hidden, change the answer. We study three MedGemma-4B variants, cross-family probes on LLaVA-RAD and Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct, and the specialist CheXagent-2-3b, with two CXR-trained classifiers (DenseNet121, ResNet50) as positive controls. A heatmap is faithful only if the model uses the image and attention concentrates on regions whose occlusion alters the prediction. No evaluated VLM meets both criteria. MedGemma and Qwen3-VL use the image, but attention anti-correlates with patch-occlusion importance (rho < 0 with 95% bootstrap CIs below zero). LLaVA-RAD's attention correlates positively, but the model is almost text-only (99.1% text-only agreement, near-zero causal mass), so correlation ties two near-zero signals. Attention also misses annotated anatomy: overlap with true regions never beats shifted or random controls, and no method places more than 22% of its mass inside radiologist masks. The two CXR classifiers pass all metrics, indicating the failure is specific to VLM heatmaps, not the evaluation. These heatmaps are visually reassuring but not faithful; clinical explanations require controlled localization metrics and causal perturbation, not visual inspection alone.

AI.tldr: 本文通过因果检验发现，医学视觉语言模型（VLM）在胸部X光片上生成的注意力热图看似合理，但并非忠实反映模型预测依据：没有VLM同时满足“使用图像信息”和“注意区域与遮挡扰动重要区域一致”两个忠实性标准，而专用CXR分类器则全部通过，表明失败是VLM热图特有的系统性问题。
AI.motivation: 注意力热图广泛用于解释医学VLM在胸部X光片上的输出，但其是否真正标明了驱动模型预测的图像证据尚未经过因果层面的检验，现有评估缺乏对热图忠实性的严格因果测试。
AI.method: 通过三种指标审计热图忠实性：与放射科医生标注框的重叠度（PadChest数据集，n=637）、放射科医生掩码内的归因质量（CheXlocalize，n=643）、以及16x16分块遮挡映射（记录隐藏哪些区域会改变答案）。研究覆盖MedGemma-4B三种变体、跨家族探针LLaVA-RAD和Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct、专用模型CheXagent-2-3b，并以两个CXR训练的分类器（DenseNet121、ResNet50）作为阳性对照。热图忠实性要求模型使用图像且注意集中在遮挡会改变预测的区域上。
AI.result: 所有评估的VLM均未同时满足两个忠实性标准。MedGemma和Qwen3-VL使用了图像，但注意力与分块遮挡重要性呈反相关（rho<0，95%自助法置信区间低于零）。LLaVA-RAD的注意力呈正相关，但模型几乎纯文本（99.1%纯文本一致性，因果质量接近零），因此相关性联结的是两个接近零的信号。注意力也未能覆盖标注的解剖结构：与真实区域的重叠从未优于随机或偏移对照，且任何方法在放射科医生掩码内的归因质量均不超过22%。两个CXR分类器通过所有指标，表明失败是VLM热图特有的，而非评估本身问题。
AI.conclusion: 这些热图在视觉上令人安心但并非真正忠实；临床解释需要受控的定位度量和因果扰动，而非仅依赖视觉检查。研究揭示VLM热图存在系统性的因果忠实性问题，为医学AI可解释性评估提出了重要警示。

title: Selective State-Space Adaptation and Retrieval for Language Model Reasoning
summary: Low-rank adaptation introduces a static learned update applied identically to every input. The update provides task-level adaptation but does not explicitly represent token-level or instance-level state variation. A family of adapters is proposed that introduces selective state-space recurrence at two complementary granularities. At the token level, \textbf{MaLoRA} (Mamba-modulated low-rank adaptation) makes the adapter's scaling factor a dynamic input-dependent function with recurrent state across tokens, in contrast to the stateless modulators of prior work. At the context level, \textbf{MaRA} (Mamba Retrieval Adapter) tracks cross-segment state and selects the segments most relevant to the query, before the modulated language model generates its answer. Across three frozen backbones (Qwen-2.5-7B, Llama-3.1-8B, Gemma-2-9B) and two reasoning benchmarks (MuSiQue, 2WikiMultihopQA), the family improves reasoning accuracy on every cell of the $3{\times}2$ grid, by $+6.8$ F1 ($+10.5\%$ relative) on average and up to $+9.3$ F1 ($+18.2\%$ relative) on the hardest cell over the LoRA baseline, and the token-level gains carry to RULER QA-2 under length stress.

AI.tldr: 提出MaLoRA和MaRA两类适配器，在低秩适配中引入选择性状态空间递归，实现token级和上下文级的动态输入依赖调制，在多个大模型和推理基准上显著优于LoRA基线。
AI.motivation: 标准LoRA的静态更新对所有输入施加相同的变化，仅提供任务级适配能力，无法显式捕捉token级或实例级的状态变化，缺乏对输入动态变化的细粒度建模能力。
AI.method: 提出两类适配器：MaLoRA（Mamba调制低秩适配）在token级引入Mamba状态空间递归，使适配器的缩放因子成为动态输入依赖函数并跨token维护循环状态；MaRA（Mamba检索适配器）在上下文级追踪跨片段状态并检索最相关片段，再让调制后的语言模型生成答案。
AI.result: 在Qwen-2.5-7B、Llama-3.1-8B、Gemma-2-9B三个冻结骨干和MuSiQue、2WikiMultihopQA两个推理基准的3×2网格上，每个单元均获得提升，平均F1提高+6.8（相对+10.5%），最难单元最高提升+9.3 F1（相对+18.2%），且token级增益在RULER QA-2长度压力测试中保持稳健。
AI.conclusion: 选择性状态空间递归可有效赋予LoRA动态输入感知能力，在推理任务中带来一致且显著的性能提升，且token级动态调制具有良好的长度泛化能力，为高效微调与长序列推理的结合提供了新思路。

title: DeforM: Reasoning-Guided Physics-Aware Video Generation via Spatial-Temporal Masking
summary: Video generation models achieve high visual quality but often struggle to generate physics-aware videos. Unlike rigid-body motion, which can be described by explicit trajectories or formulas, complex deformation dynamics remain challenging to synthesize. We observe that a lack of physical reasoning for localizing dynamic areas allows irrelevant regions to dilute the model's attention, leading to generation failure. In this paper, we propose DeforM, a reasoning-guided image-to-video generation framework that directs the model's focus toward physics-critical regions. To reason about and localize these critical regions, we introduce a VLM-guided physical reasoning module, DeforM-Reason, to identify target objects and generate spatial-temporal masks. For physical guidance, we develop two alternative strategies: DeforM-Free for training-free mechanism analysis and DeforM-Injection as a powerful training-based generator. Experimental results demonstrate that DeforM improves the realism of generated deformation scenarios, outperforming baseline models in both visual quality and physical consistency.

AI.tldr: DeforM 提出一种基于推理引导的图像到视频生成框架，结合 VLM 物理推理模块和空间-时间掩码，引导模型聚焦于物理关键区域，从而生成物理感知更真实的可变形体动态视频。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能生成高质量视觉内容，但在物理感知方面存在不足，尤其对于复杂变形动力学（deformation dynamics）的合成仍具挑战性；模型因缺乏对动态区域的物理推理能力，导致无关区域分散注意力，从而引发生成失败。
AI.method: 提出 DeforM 框架，包含两个核心组件：DeforM-Reason 模块，利用 VLM（视觉语言模型）进行物理推理，识别目标物体并生成空间-时间掩码以定位物理关键区域；以及两种引导策略——DeforM-Free（无训练机制分析）和 DeforM-Injection（基于训练的强生成器），用于将物理引导信息注入图像到视频生成过程。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，DeforM 在生成变形场景的真实感方面显著优于基线模型，在视觉质量和物理一致性两个维度均取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该研究揭示了将物理推理显式引入视频生成模型的有效性，通过引导注意力聚焦于物理关键区域可显著提升变形动态的生成质量，为物理感知视频生成提供了新的范式。

title: State Compression in Two-Agent LLM Relays: A Closed-World Study of Constraint Preservation
summary: Long-running Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents often accumulate large intermediate traces containing audits, eliminations, and numeric calculations. In practice, this state is compressed before handing it to a downstream decision step, creating an information bottleneck in which small omissions can break strict numeric or categorical constraints. This paper evaluates hand-off compression in a closed-world travel-planning relay with two LLM agents. A Researcher audits a fixed inventory of hotels and flights for 50 goal instances, and a Booker selects a hotel--flight pair using only the goal and the hand-off payload, with the inventory withheld. We compare four hand-off conditions: no compression, narrative summarization, schema-constrained JSON extraction, and embedding-based pruning. Exhaustive enumeration over the fixed inventory provides exact feasible and optimal labels. Results show that hand-off representation strongly affects downstream feasibility under a small decision model. JSON extraction achieves the highest feasibility accuracy at 0.96, while narrative summarization, despite producing the smallest compressed hand-off payload, degrades feasibility to 0.48. Embedding-based pruning matches the uncompressed control on feasibility at 0.88 without an additional generative compression call. These findings indicate that constraint checking benefits from structured and auditable hand-off representations rather than relying on brevity alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究LLM智能体在长时运行场景中状态压缩对下游决策可行性的影响，在闭域旅行规划中对比四种压缩策略，发现结构化JSON抽取在可行性上达到0.96，而叙事摘要虽压缩量最小但可行性能降至0.48，表明约束满足依赖于可审计的结构化表示而非仅追求简洁。
AI.motivation: 长时运行的LLM智能体会积累大量中间追踪信息（如审计、消除、数值计算），这些状态在传递给下游决策步骤前通常需要压缩，但压缩过程中微小的信息遗漏可能破坏严格的数值或类别约束，形成信息瓶颈，现有研究对此问题缺乏系统评估。
AI.method: 在闭域旅行规划接力任务中，使用两个LLM智能体（Researcher负责审计固定库存的酒店和航班，Booker仅基于目标和压缩后的交接载荷选择酒店-航班对），对比四种压缩策略：无压缩、叙事摘要、基于Schema约束的JSON抽取、基于嵌入的剪枝，并通过固定库存的穷举枚举获得精确的可行解和最优解标签。
AI.result: JSON抽取在可行性准确率上最高达到0.96，嵌入剪枝在无额外生成式压缩调用下与无压缩基线持平（0.88），叙事摘要虽生成最小压缩载荷但可行性准确率仅0.48，表明压缩表示方式对下游可行性有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 约束检查任务更受益于结构化、可审计的交接表示而非仅追求简洁性，结构化JSON压缩在保持高可行性的同时实现有效压缩，为LLM智能体状态压缩设计提供了重要指导。

title: MissingBench-Verified: Probing Vision-Language Models' Inability to Detect Missing Object Parts
comment: Submitted to the ECCV 2026 Workshop on Explainable Computer Vision (eXCV). 11 pages, 4 figures
summary: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are well known for hallucinating non-existent objects in images. Objects with missing parts present a unique challenge for VLMs, stemming from both real-world knowledge bias and the scarcity of such images in training data. We present MissingBench-Verified, a benchmark designed to evaluate a specific and practically relevant scenario: when vision-language models fail to recognize that an essential component of an object has been removed. Across ten leading models, we observe consistent and significant failure rates that persist even when external tool evidence explicitly contradicts the model's visual perception. We further ask whether granting models access to image processing tools (e.g., cropping, contrast adjustment) enables autonomous inspection to resolve these failures. We find that existing mitigation strategies, including tool-assisted verification, autonomous visual reasoning, longer reasoning durations, and fine-tuning on an easier dataset, provide negligible improvement, indicating that this failure mode cannot be addressed through current prompting or post-hoc correction techniques. Our findings highlight a fundamental limitation of current VLM for inspection and monitoring tasks and underscore the need for architectural or training-level interventions that enable models to override internal expectations when confronted with contradictory evidence.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MissingBench-Verified基准，系统评估了视觉语言模型在识别物体缺失关键部件时的严重失败现象，发现现有提示策略、工具辅助验证和微调方法均无法有效缓解这一根本性局限。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言模型已知会产生幻觉，尤其是在物体部分缺失的场景下，这一问题同时源于真实世界知识偏差和训练数据中此类图像的稀缺，现有方法未能有效解决这一特定且实际相关的失败模式。
AI.method: 研究构建了MissingBench-Verified基准，评估10种主流视觉语言模型在物体缺失关键部件时的识别能力，并测试了多种缓解策略，包括工具辅助验证（裁剪、对比度调整）、自主视觉推理、延长推理时间以及在较简单数据集上进行微调。
AI.result: 所有10种模型均表现出一致且显著的失败率，即使外部工具证据明确反驳模型的视觉感知时失败依然存在，现有缓解策略（工具验证、自主推理、长推理时长、微调）均未能带来实质性改善。
AI.conclusion: 当前视觉语言模型在处理与内部预期相矛盾的视觉证据时存在根本性局限，无法通过提示或事后修正技术解决，亟需架构层或训练层的干预来使模型能够覆盖内部预期。

title: Operational Hallucination and Safety Drift in AI Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) serving as planners in tool-using autonomous agents introduce dynamic reliability risks in multi-turn execution. While single-turn safety mechanisms are relatively mature, extended interactions reveal structural vulnerabilities where initial alignment degrades over time. This paper empirically characterizes two observed failure modes across multiple state-of-the-art LLMs: Safety Drift, the gradual erosion of declared safety intent leading to constraint-violating actions (e.g., textual refusal followed by reconnaissance and unsafe execution), and Operational Hallucination, persistent repetitive tool calls indicative of flawed state perception (e.g., livelocks even in legitimate tasks). Through controlled multi-turn evaluation on high-stakes ethical dilemmas, malicious requests, and benign controls, we quantify these phenomena using declaration-action gap and livelock metrics, demonstrating their cross-model prevalence under direct execution protocols. Root-cause analysis attributes the instabilities to the decoupling of reasoning context from execution state in current agent loops. We propose an Action-Aware Supervision Layer - a lightweight, plug-and-play architectural blueprint incorporating intent-action consistency checks, runtime state tracking, and forced termination primitives. Post-hoc simulation on captured failure trajectories shows the layer can intercept observed violations without false positives on benign cases. This work advances agent reliability by shifting focus from linguistic safeguards to enforceable architectural mechanisms for responsible agentic AI.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实证识别了多轮工具使用自主代理中大型语言模型的两类失效模式——安全漂移和操作幻觉，并提出了一种轻量级的即插即用架构蓝图——动作感知监督层，通过意图-动作一致性检查、运行时状态跟踪和强制终止原语来拦截违规行为，事后仿真表明该层能在良性案例上无假阳性地拦截所有观测到的违规。
AI.motivation: 现有单轮安全机制相对成熟，但在多轮交互场景下，大型语言模型作为工具使用自主代理的规划器时，初始对齐会随时间退化，暴露出结构性脆弱性，缺乏针对多轮执行可靠性的系统性分析和可部署的架构级防御机制。
AI.method: 本文通过在多轮高利害伦理困境、恶意请求和良性控制任务上对多个最先进的大型语言模型进行受控评估，用量化声明-动作差距和活锁指标来表征安全漂移和操作幻觉两类失效模式；基于根因分析将不稳定性归因于当前代理循环中推理上下文与执行状态的解耦，进而提出动作感知监督层——一种包含意图-动作一致性检查、运行时状态跟踪和强制终止原语的轻量级即插即用架构蓝图。
AI.result: 实验表明安全漂移（初始安全声明的逐步退化导致违反约束的动作）和操作幻觉（持续重复的工具调用反映有缺陷的状态感知）在多种主流大型语言模型中跨模型普遍存在；事后仿真表明所提出的动作感知监督层能够在良性用例上无假阳性地拦截所有观测到的违规行为。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了多轮工具使用自主代理中大型语言模型安全性的结构性退化模式，并将焦点从语言层面的安全防护转向可强制执行的架构级机制，为构建负责任的自主代理人工智能提供了切实可行的设计蓝图。

title: Attributes Should Come from Images, Not Class Names: Distribution-Conditioned Attribute Selection for Vision-Language Models
summary: A popular route to interpretable zero-shot classification asks a large language model (LLM) to describe each class name and prompts CLIP with the resulting descriptors. We show that these descriptors carry little visual evidence of their own: removing the class name from the prompt collapses ImageNet accuracy from 59.5% to 15.5%. The diagnosis is that the descriptors are conditioned on the label rather than on the images, so they describe the concept in general and mislead exactly when the data shifts; an LLM insists that strawberries are red, but every strawberry in ImageNet-Sketch is a colorless line drawing. We therefore select attributes from the target image collection instead: we score a large attribute pool against the images in CLIP's joint embedding space and keep the top-scoring attributes per class. Selected this way, class-name-free attribute prompts reach 23.8% on ImageNet (against 15.5% for LLM descriptors), the gain holds on four shifted ImageNet variants, and reselecting from the LLM's own pool isolates the selection mechanism as the cause. With one image per class, the selected attributes outperform the prompt-tuning method CoOp by 3 points while fitting in under a minute instead of 14 hours, with no learned soft prompt to obscure the decision. Because the attribute set is chosen by the data, it doubles as a readable summary of a dataset, which we use to describe distribution shift in words.

AI.tldr: 本文发现LLM生成的类别描述符在零样本分类中缺乏视觉证据，提出从目标图像集合中筛选属性来替代，在移除类名后显著提升性能，并可作为数据集的可读摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有的可解释零样本分类方法通常使用LLM为每个类别生成描述符，再输入CLIP进行分类，但本文诊断出这些描述符严重依赖于类别标签而非图像本身，导致在数据分布偏移（如图像风格变化）时性能大幅下降，例如仅移除类名就会使ImageNet准确率从59.5%骤降至15.5%。
AI.method: 本文提出一种数据驱动的属性选择方法：构建一个大型属性池，在CLIP的联合嵌入空间中将每个属性与目标图像集合进行评分，为每个类别保留得分最高的属性作为提示，完全移除类名。该方法与LLM生成描述符的流程解耦，可在仅使用每个类别一张图像的情况下快速完成属性选择。
AI.result: 在无类名条件下，数据选择的属性提示在ImageNet上达到23.8%准确率（LLM描述符仅15.5%），在四个分布偏移的ImageNet变体上同样保持优势；从LLM自己的属性池中重新选择即可复现增益，证明选择机制是性能提升的原因。仅用每类一张图像时，该方法在性能上超越提示调优方法CoOp 3个百分点，而运行时间从14小时降至1分钟以内。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了LLM生成描述符在零样本分类中的根本性局限——描述的是概念本身而非视觉实例，并提出数据驱动属性选择作为简单、高效且可解释的替代方案。所选属性集能够作为数据集的可读摘要，用于描述分布偏移，具有较好的诊断价值。

title: AgentDebugX: An Open-Source Toolkit for Failure Observability, Attribution, and Recovery in LLM Agents
summary: LLM agent failures are difficult to debug because the step where an error surfaces is often not the one that caused it. Existing observability tools replay execution traces but provide little support for identifying the root cause or translating diagnosis into recovery. We present AgentDebugX, an open-source debugging framework that organizes debugging as a closed loop of Detect, Attribute, Recover, and Rerun. At its core, DeepDebug performs multi-turn root-cause diagnosis through global trajectory understanding, structure-guided investigation, and cross-examination. On the Who and When benchmark, DeepDebug achieves the best strict attribution accuracy among the evaluated methods on both tested open-weight backbones, reaching 28.8 percent exact agent-and-step accuracy on qwen3.5-9b versus 21.7 percent for the strongest single-pass baseline. On GAIA, DeepDebug repairs 13 of 73 failed tasks in a single rerun, compared with 4 to 6 for three decoupled self-correction baselines, improving overall accuracy from 55.8 percent to 63.6 percent. AgentDebugX exposes this workflow through a Python library, CLI, web console, and installable agentic skill, and provides an opt-in Error Hub for sharing scrubbed failure-diagnosis-repair bundles and reusing them as debugging memory.

AI.tldr: AgentDebugX是一个开源的LLM智能体调试框架，将调试组织为检测-归因-恢复-重试的闭环流程，其核心组件DeepDebug通过全局轨迹理解、结构引导调查和交叉检验实现多轮根因诊断，在Who and When基准上达到28.8%的精确智能体-步骤归因准确率，并在GAIA基准上通过单次重试修复73个失败任务中的13个，将整体准确率从55.8%提升至63.6%。
AI.motivation: LLM智能体的故障难以调试，因为错误显现的步骤往往并非其根本原因所在，而现有可观测性工具仅能回放执行轨迹，缺乏对根因定位的支持，也无法将诊断转化为恢复策略。
AI.method: AgentDebugX提出了一种闭环调试框架，包含检测(Detect)、归因(Attribute)、恢复(Recover)和重试(Rerun)四个阶段；其核心组件DeepDebug通过全局轨迹理解、结构引导调查和交叉检验进行多轮根因诊断，并通过Python库、CLI、Web控制台和可安装的智能体技能暴露工作流，同时提供可选的Error Hub用于共享和复用脱敏的故障-诊断-修复数据包作为调试记忆。
AI.result: 在Who and When基准上，DeepDebug在两种测试的开源骨干模型上均实现了最佳严格归因准确率，在qwen3.5-9b上达到28.8%的精确智能体-步骤准确率，而最强单次基线仅为21.7%；在GAIA基准上，DeepDebug通过单次重试修复了73个失败任务中的13个，而三个解耦的自校正基线仅修复4到6个，将整体准确率从55.8%提升至63.6%。
AI.conclusion: AgentDebugX通过将调试组织为检测-归因-恢复-重试的闭环流程，并采用多轮根因诊断策略，显著优于单次归因基线和解耦自校正方法，证明了结构化、上下文感知的调试框架对于提升LLM智能体可靠性的有效性；其开放的Error Hub设计为跨场景故障知识复用提供了可能。

title: Decoupled Pipeline with Proposal Reranking and Score Fusion for Positive-Unlabeled Marine Species Detection
summary: The FathomNetCLEF 2026 competition combines underwater object detection and fine-grained marine species classification under a positive-unlabeled evaluation setting. The provided training labels are sparse, while the hidden test set is out-of-distribution relative to the training imagery, creating both annotation incompleteness and source-shift challenges. We describe DS@GT ARC's multi-stage system developed for this setting while keeping model training restricted to the data provided by the competition. The final private-leaderboard model uses a frozen Megalodon YOLOv8x detector as a class-agnostic proposal generator, combines global and tiled inference with tile-edge filtering, classifies expanded proposal crops with a LoRA-finetuned DINOv3 ViT-H classifier, and ranks predictions using weighted geometric fusion of detector and classifier confidence. This system placed 12th out of 102 teams. A closely related variant added a locally trained TTN-inspired validity head as a light reranking signal, improving public-leaderboard and proxy-evaluation performance but slightly reducing private-leaderboard performance. Across experiments, the strongest lesson was that train-derived validation and detector-only metrics were not reliable enough for model selection. Instead, we used proxy datasets only for validation and comparison, and combined those signals with leaderboard feedback and targeted ablations. These experiments showed that reserving proposal recall, avoiding over-aggressive filtering, and improving downstream ranking were more effective than fine-tuning the detector or directly training on noisy pseudo-labels. Code: https://github.com/dsgt-arc/fathomnetclef-2026.

AI.tldr: DS@GT ARC 团队在 FathomNetCLEF 2026 竞赛中开发了一套多阶段水下目标检测与细粒度分类系统，采用冻结的 Megalodon YOLOv8x 作为类无关候选框生成器、LoRA 微调 DINOv3 ViT-H 作为分类器，并融合加权几何平均进行排序，在正-无标签且训练-测试分布偏移的严苛设定下取得 102 支队伍中第 12 名的成绩。
AI.motivation: FathomNetCLEF 2026 竞赛设定了正-无标签（PU）学习场景：训练标签稀疏且不完整，而隐藏测试集与训练集存在分布偏移（out-of-distribution），同时面临标注不完整（annotation incompleteness）和源偏移（source-shift）双重挑战。
AI.method: 该系统采用多阶段流水线：第一阶段使用冻结的 Megalodon YOLOv8x 检测器作为类无关（class-agnostic）候选框生成器，结合全局推理与分块推理（tiled inference）并施加边缘过滤；第二阶段使用 LoRA 微调的 DINOv3 ViT-H 分类器对扩展后的候选框裁剪图进行分类；第三阶段通过检测器置信度与分类器置信度的加权几何融合（weighted geometric fusion）对预测结果进行排序。一个变体还引入了基于 TTN 启发在本地训练的合法性头部（validity head）作为轻量级重排序信号。
AI.result: 该系统在私榜（private leaderboard）上排名第 12 位（共 102 支队伍）；加入 TTN 启发的合法性头部变体在公榜（public leaderboard）和代理评估（proxy evaluation）上有所提升，但私榜得分略有下降。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，基于训练集的验证指标和仅依赖检测器的度量不足以可靠地进行模型选择；应使用代理数据集进行验证和对比，并结合排行榜反馈与针对性消融实验。关键经验是：保留候选框召回率、避免过度激进的过滤、改进下游排序比微调检测器或直接训练噪声伪标签更有效。

title: Bounding Boxes to Improve Small Language Model Performance on Vision-Based Grading Tasks
comment: Accepted for 1st Workshop on Small Language Models for Education (SLM4ED '26) at AIED 2026
summary: The deployment of Small Language Models (SLMs) in educational settings offers significant advantages in terms of privacy, cost, and scalability. However, SLMs often struggle with complex vision-based tasks, such as grading handwritten student exams, due to the high computational cost of processing large images and the visual distractions present on a full page. In this paper, we investigate whether cropping student responses using bounding boxes can improve the accuracy and computational efficiency of SLMs on a short-answer grading task. Using a dataset of scanned handwritten responses from the 2025 Australian Physics Olympiad, we evaluate the performance of several models ranging from 4B to 72B parameters under varying conditions of Chain of Thought (CoT) prompting and image cropping. Our results demonstrate that using bounding boxes significantly improves grading accuracy and reduces computational cost (FLOPs) across models. We conclude that bounding boxes are a crucial pre-processing step for deploying SLMs in large-scale, vision-based educational assessments.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在小型语言模型（SLMs）处理手写简答题评分任务时，通过边界框（bounding boxes）裁剪学生作答图像能否提升准确率与计算效率。实验表明，该方法显著提升了多个模型的评分精度并降低了FLOPs，是SLMs在教育场景中大规模部署的关键预处理步骤。
AI.motivation: 小型语言模型（SLMs）在教育场景部署中具备隐私、成本和可扩展性优势，但在处理基于视觉的复杂任务（如手写试卷评分）时表现不佳，其根源在于处理大尺寸图像的高计算成本以及全页图像中存在的视觉干扰因素。本研究旨在探索通过边界框裁剪学生作答区域是否能同时提升SLMs在简答题评分任务上的准确性与计算效率。
AI.method: 使用来自2025年澳大利亚物理奥林匹克竞赛的手写扫描答卷数据集，评估了从4B到72B参数规模的多个语言模型在链式思考（Chain of Thought）提示和图像裁剪两种条件下的表现。图像裁剪通过边界框（bounding boxes）提取学生作答区域作为模型输入。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，使用边界框进行图像裁剪显著提升了所有模型的评分准确率，同时有效降低了计算开销（以FLOPs衡量）。该结论在多个不同参数规模的模型上均保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 边界框裁剪是SLMs在大规模、基于视觉的教育评估中部署时的一项关键预处理步骤，能够同时提升精度与效率。该发现为SLMs在真实教育场景中的实际应用提供了重要的技术指导。

title: BatchDAG: LLM-Planned Execution Graphs for Scalable Ad-Hoc Analysis Over Enterprise Data
summary: Large language models (LLMs) excel at analyzing individual documents but break down on exhaustive, cross-entity analytical questions over enterprise-scale datasets due to context overflow, loss of per-entity attribution, and linear latency from sequential tool calls. We present BatchDAG, a system in which an LLM generates a typed directed acyclic graph (DAG) of operations -- SQL queries, semantic searches, in-memory transforms, parallel fan-outs, and single-shot analyses -- which a deterministic engine evaluates with topological-wave parallelism and structured JSON data flow. A key optimization, entity-aware batching, groups rows by logical entity before fan-out, reducing LLM calls by up to 47x. BatchDAG is not primarily an accuracy improvement over hand-optimized pipelines; rather, it is a general-purpose orchestration layer that replaces multiple hand-engineered workflows with a single system that generates the appropriate execution strategy from natural language. In controlled experiments on 12 transcript-heavy queries, BatchDAG (3.74/5) achieves quality comparable to an expert-designed pipeline (3.25/5) and significantly outperforms a ReAct agent (3.09/5, p<0.01), with superior provenance (77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60% for baselines). A controlled ablation shows structured JSON intermediates reduce hallucinations by 27% versus prose summaries (paired t-test, p=0.107, n=12). The planner achieves 98.8% valid-DAG rate across 300 planning calls. In production at Brevian.ai, BatchDAG processes queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds, with measured per-query costs of $0.02-$0.24 at published GPT-5.1 pricing.

AI.tldr: BatchDAG is an LLM-powered orchestration system that generates a typed DAG of operations (SQL, search, transforms, parallel fan-outs) for cross-entity analytical queries over enterprise-scale datasets, achieving quality comparable to expert-designed pipelines while reducing LLM calls by up to 47x via entity-aware batching and supporting queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds.
AI.motivation: LLMs excel at individual document analysis but fail on exhaustive, cross-entity analytical queries over enterprise-scale datasets due to context overflow, loss of per-entity attribution, and linear latency from sequential tool calls; existing approaches require hand-engineered workflows for each query type.
AI.method: BatchDAG has an LLM planner generate a typed directed acyclic graph (DAG) of operations including SQL queries, semantic searches, in-memory transforms, parallel fan-outs, and single-shot analyses; a deterministic engine evaluates this DAG with topological-wave parallelism and structured JSON data flow, with a key optimization called entity-aware batching that groups rows by logical entity before fan-out to reduce LLM calls.
AI.result: On 12 transcript-heavy queries, BatchDAG (3.74/5) achieves quality comparable to an expert-designed pipeline (3.25/5) and significantly outperforms a ReAct agent (3.09/5, p<0.01), with superior provenance (77% transcript evidence rate vs. 46-60%). Structured JSON intermediates reduce hallucinations by 27% versus prose summaries. The planner achieves 98.8% valid-DAG rate across 300 calls, and entity-aware batching reduces LLM calls by up to 47x. In production, BatchDAG processes queries over 50,000+ meetings in under 60 seconds with per-query costs of $0.02-$0.24.
AI.conclusion: BatchDAG serves as a general-purpose orchestration layer that replaces multiple hand-engineered workflows with a single system generating appropriate execution strategies from natural language, demonstrating that structured data flow and entity-aware parallelism are effective design principles for scaling LLM-based analysis to enterprise datasets.

title: AI Tour Meeting: Group Travel Planning by LLM Agents
summary: This paper proposes AI Tour Meeting, a group travel planning framework powered by multiple Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents. The agents are instantiated with distinct personas and collaboratively seek an itinerary that satisfies their constraints and preferences through natural language discussion. The framework enables easy and flexible orchestration of such discussions by providing interfaces for configuring agent personas, discussion workflows, monitoring, and LLM deployment. Its primary use case is a simulation tool for analyzing the behavior of multiple LLM agents during tour planning discussions. This paper demonstrates the utility of the framework by presenting system validation and several analytical results obtained by the framework.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AI Tour Meeting，一个基于多个大语言模型（LLM）智能体的群组旅行规划框架，通过配置不同角色的智能体进行自然语言讨论，协作生成满足各成员约束和偏好的行程方案，并支持讨论流程的灵活编排与行为分析。
AI.motivation: 现有的旅行规划工具多面向个人用户，难以有效处理群组旅行中多个成员的不同偏好与约束之间的冲突与协调问题，缺乏能够模拟和分析多智能体协作讨论过程的系统化框架。
AI.method: 该框架实例化多个具有不同人设的LLM智能体，通过自然语言讨论协作寻找满足各成员约束与偏好的行程方案；提供配置智能体人设、讨论工作流、监控及LLM部署的接口，支持灵活编排讨论流程，主要用于多LLM智能体在旅行规划讨论中的行为仿真与分析。
AI.result: 论文通过系统验证展示了框架的实用性，并利用该框架获得了若干关于多LLM智能体在旅行规划讨论中行为模式的分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为研究多LLM智能体在协作式群组规划中的交互行为提供了有效的仿真工具，未来可用于更广泛的群体决策场景分析与智能体行为研究。

title: Image Editing Models are Numerical Solvers
summary: We investigate whether a pretrained generative image-editing model can provide a common interface for numerical simulation. Physical inputs and solutions are rendered as images, while scalar quantities such as material properties, diffusivity, and loading parameters enter through lightweight adapters. Using established numerical and analytic solvers for supervision, we apply the same architecture and training protocol to heterogeneous elliptic equations, forced heat and Burgers evolution, complex Ginzburg-Landau dynamics, two-dimensional Navier-Stokes prediction, potential flow, elasticity, eikonal travel time, phase-field fracture, and entropic optimal transport. The results show that a pretrained image model can represent diverse static and time-dependent physical mappings, including unstable and shock-like behavior, when each task is expressed through a suitable visual encoding. This work is a capability study rather than an attempt to surpass specialized solvers. It also identifies fundamental constraints: image and latent representations complicate numerical range selection and direct enforcement of governing equations or invariants, while a failed Kuramoto-Sivashinsky experiment indicates that representation errors prevent meaningful long-horizon simulation of chaotic systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了使用预训练生成式图像编辑模型作为统一接口进行数值模拟的可行性，通过将物理输入和求解结果渲染为图像并结合轻量级适配器处理标量参数，在多种静态和时变物理问题上取得了有效结果，但同时也揭示了图像表示在数值范围控制、方程约束和混沌系统长时程模拟方面的根本限制。
AI.motivation: 传统的数值求解器通常针对特定物理问题定制，缺乏统一的通用接口。本文旨在研究能否利用预训练的生成式图像编辑模型作为一个共同界面，来表示和处理多种不同的物理模拟任务，从而探索一种替代性的、更通用的数值模拟范式。
AI.method: 使用预训练的生成式图像编辑模型作为基础架构，将物理输入和求解结果渲染为图像表示，标量物理量（如材料属性、扩散率、加载参数）通过轻量级适配器注入模型。采用已有的数值解和解析解作为监督信号，以相同的架构和训练协议处理异质椭圆方程、受迫热方程和Burgers方程、复Ginzburg-Landau动力学、二维Navier-Stokes预测、势流、弹性力学、eikonal走时、相场断裂和熵正则最优传输等多种物理问题。
AI.result: 预训练图像模型能够表示多种静态和时变物理映射，包括不稳定和激波类行为，前提是每个任务都通过合适的视觉编码表达。然而，图像和潜在表示使得数值范围选择困难，且难以直接强制执行控制方程或不变量。Kuramoto-Sivashinsky实验失败表明，表示误差使得混沌系统的有意义的长期模拟无法实现。
AI.conclusion: 本研究是一项能力探索而非试图超越专用求解器。结果表明，图像模型作为物理模拟的统一接口具有潜力，但存在根本性约束：视觉表示的数值精度有限，无法天然满足物理守恒律和偏微分方程约束，尤其在混沌系统中误差累积导致长期预测不可靠。这指出了该方向未来需要克服的关键挑战。

title: Semantic Cooperative Games for Contribution Attribution in LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems
summary: Contribution attribution has become a central problem in LLM-based multi-agent systems, where final outputs are produced through multiple agents, message exchanges, and ordered workflow dependencies. Existing attribution methods often rely on counterfactual valuation, such as removing agents or comparing score changes across altered agent subsets. In language-mediated workflows, these methods require repeated model calls, introduce high variance, and do not explicitly capture the intermediate semantic states through which agents produce, preserve, and transform task-relevant information. We propose Semantic Cooperative Games (SCG), a framework that represents a realized language flow as a semantic generation hypergraph and induces an agent-level semantic value function on this structure. We define the Semantic Shapley Value (SSV) to allocate contribution over semantic support logic, and introduce SLIC, a single-trajectory algorithm that constructs the semantic hypergraph, recovers minimal semantic supports, applies Boolean absorption, and computes SSV without rerunning agent subsets. We prove that SSV reduces to the classical Shapley value under standard set-based, fully observable, and no-order-dependence conditions. On a medical benchmark satisfying these conditions, SLIC reduces computation cost by 93.3% while remaining highly consistent with a Monte Carlo Shapley baseline. In more general multi-role workflows, SSV aligns with perturbation-induced score-drop profiles and exposes cases where semantic contribution and failure impact diverge. Overall, SLIC provides a fast, counterfactual-free, and interpretable attribution method for complex LLM-based multi-agent systems.

AI.tldr: 提出语义合作博弈（SCG）框架与语义Shapley值（SSV），通过单轨迹算法SLIC在不重新运行代理子集的情况下，为基于LLM的多智能体系统实现快速、无反事实且可解释的贡献归因。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的多智能体系统中的贡献归因方法依赖反事实估值，如移除代理或比较不同子集下的分数变化，这需要重复模型调用、引入高方差，且无法显式捕获代理在语言中介工作流中产生、保存和转换任务相关信息的中间语义状态。该研究旨在解决这一方法缺陷。
AI.method: 提出语义合作博弈（SCG）框架，将已实现的语言流表示为语义生成超图，并在此结构上定义代理级语义值函数；定义语义Shapley值（SSV）用于基于语义支持逻辑分配贡献；提出SLIC算法，通过构建语义超图、恢复最小语义支持、应用布尔吸收并计算SSV，无需重新运行代理子集。理论上证明SSV在标准集合、完全可观测和无顺序依赖条件下退化为经典Shapley值。
AI.result: 在满足理论条件的医学基准上，SLIC相比蒙特卡洛Shapley基线降低了93.3%的计算成本，同时保持高度一致性；在更通用的多角色工作流中，SSV与扰动引发的分数下降曲线对齐，并揭示了语义贡献与失败影响出现偏离的情况。
AI.conclusion: SLIC为复杂的基于LLM的多智能体系统提供了一种快速、无需反事实且可解释的归因方法，能够有效捕捉代理间的语义交互并降低计算开销。

title: Agents in the Wild: Where Research Meets Deployment
summary: Agentic systems large language model (LLM) based architectures capable of reasoning, planning, acting, and coordinating with tools and other agents are rapidly transitioning from research prototypes to production scale deployments across domains such as software engineering, scientific discovery, and finance. While academic work has emphasized benchmarks and algorithmic innovation, deployment raises new challenges around robustness, safety, and reliability. This tutorial brings together researchers and practitioners to explore advances in reasoning and planning, multi agent coordination, and evaluation, highlighting open challenges arising from deployment experience. Through applied case studies in pharmaceutical discovery and financial systems, we analyze common design patterns that make agentic systems successful, and discuss practical mitigation strategies for failure modes, such as verification pipelines, fallback mechanisms, and human in the loop supervision. Attendees will gain a comprehensive view of the field along with concrete design patterns, evaluation checklists, and templates for safe and reliable deployment across industries.

AI.tldr: 本教程系统梳理了基于大语言模型的智能体系统从研究原型到生产部署过程中面临的鲁棒性、安全性和可靠性挑战，并提供了跨行业的设计模式、评估清单及缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 尽管学术界在智体系统的基准测试和算法创新方面已有大量工作，但面向生产环境的大规模部署带来了关于鲁棒性、安全性和可靠性的全新挑战，现有研究对此关注不足，形成了重要的研究与实践缺口。
AI.method: 通过整合推理与规划、多智能体协调及评估等前沿进展，结合制药发现与金融系统领域的应用案例，分析成功智体系统的通用设计模式，并提出包含验证管线、回退机制和人机协同监督等环节的实战缓解策略。
AI.result: 该教程提炼了可用于跨行业安全可靠部署的通用设计模式、评估检查清单及部署模板，为从研究原型过渡到生产环境的智体系统提供了系统化的实践指导。
AI.conclusion: 基于大语言模型的智能体系统在软件工程、科学发现和金融等领域的生产部署已进入加速阶段，但必须通过结构化设计模式、多层级验证和人类监督机制来应对鲁棒性、安全性与可靠性等开放挑战，才能实现跨行业的广泛应用。

title: Moving Alphabet: A Controlled Study of Training Data for Text-to-Video Generation
summary: Text-to-video generation has advanced significantly over the past five years through scaling of model size, data, and compute. Unlike model architecture, training data is often underexplored. Real-world data curation is complex and non-trivial, involving clip selection from raw videos and captioning to create video-text pairs for learning text-to-video mappings. We study how data distribution and caption quality impact text-to-video models. To enable controlled experiments, we introduce Moving Alphabet, a procedural testbed that renders letters with varying fonts, colors, sizes, and positions, moving in different directions and speeds against a black background. This design allows precise control over data distribution and caption quality by corrupting ground-truth metadata. Our experiments yield three findings: a) a diverse and balanced distribution of video content and duration is critical for generalization; b) caption quality significantly affects both model performance and training efficiency, suggesting that text-to-video models are bounded by video understanding capabilities; and c) classifier-free guidance and fine-tuning on high-quality data provide partial recovery from models trained on corrupted captions, but cannot fully compensate for poor pre-training data. We believe these insights can inform the development of large-scale text-to-video models, and we advocate for greater attention to the science of pre-training data.

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入可控测试平台 Moving Alphabet，系统研究了数据分布和字幕质量对文本到视频生成模型的影响，发现多样化的视频内容分布和高品质字幕对模型泛化与训练效率至关重要，且高质量微调无法完全弥补预训练数据的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 尽管文本到视频生成模型在规模扩展方面取得了显著进展，但训练数据的组织与质量这一关键因素却很少被系统研究；真实世界的数据筛选和字幕生成过程复杂且难以控制，导致数据分布和字幕质量对模型性能的影响缺乏定量理解。
AI.method: 作者提出 Moving Alphabet 测试平台，通过程序化渲染带有不同字体、颜色、大小和位置的字母在黑背景上以不同方向和速度运动，并利用损坏真实元数据的方式精确控制数据分布和字幕质量，从而在可控条件下进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明：(a) 视频内容和时长的多样化与平衡分布对泛化能力至关重要；(b) 字幕质量显著影响模型性能和训练效率，暗示文本到视频模型的能力受限于视频理解水平；(c) 无分类器引导和高质量数据微调虽能部分恢复模型在损坏字幕下的表现，但无法完全弥补预训练数据质量低下带来的损失。
AI.conclusion: 本研究揭示了预训练数据分布和字幕质量对文本到视频模型的根本性影响，强调在扩展模型规模的同时必须重视数据科学的系统研究，并指出高质量微调无法替代优质的预训练数据。

title: FindStatBench: Evaluating Large Language Models on Combinatorial Code Synthesis
summary: We introduce FindStatBench, an execution benchmark for evaluating large language models on combinatorial code synthesis. Built from FindStat, it contains 2,329 tasks across 24 collections and 5.52M hidden instances, covering statistic synthesis, which maps objects to integers, and map synthesis, which maps objects to objects. Each task gives a mathematical description and at most five public input-output examples; a model must emit one Python solve function with no retrieval, tool use, execution feedback, voting, or reranking. Submissions are scored by exact sandboxed execution on held-out combinatorial objects. We evaluate eleven systems: four closed-source production models and seven open-weight models served through one inference provider. FindStatBench reveals three main patterns. First, the strongest open- and closed-source systems converge within 1 pp instance accuracy, and both an oracle over all systems and five-way sampling from one mid-tier model yield only limited task-accuracy gains. Second, examples can hurt: several classical bijections are solved perfectly with zero examples but fail under five-example prompts. Third, some failures reflect output-budget mechanics, as reasoning can exhaust the visible response before code is emitted. Overall, statistic synthesis is much easier than map synthesis, some collections remain near-zero, long prompts cause a sharp accuracy cliff, and exact symbolic rule induction remains brittle.

AI.tldr: FindStatBench是一个用于评估大语言模型在组合代码合成能力上的执行基准，包含2,329个任务和552万个隐藏实例，覆盖统计合成与映射合成两类任务。实验表明最强开源与闭源系统在实例准确率上差距在1个百分点以内，示例反而可能降低性能，且精确符号规则归纳仍然脆弱。
AI.motivation: 现有基准难以准确评估大语言模型在严格数学定义下的组合代码合成能力，尤其是涉及精确符号规则归纳的任务。作者希望构建一个无需检索、工具调用或执行反馈的纯执行基准，填补对模型从有限示例中推导精确组合函数这一能力的系统评估空白。
AI.method: 基于FindStat构建了FindStatBench，包含2,329个任务（分属24个集合）和552万个隐藏实例，任务分为统计合成（对象到整数映射）和映射合成（对象到对象映射）。每个任务提供数学描述和至多五个公开输入输出示例，模型需输出单个Python求解函数，提交后通过沙盒执行在隐藏组合对象上进行准确率评分。
AI.result: 在11个系统（4个闭源+7个开源）上的评估显示：最强开源与闭源系统实例准确率差距小于1个百分点，所有系统的集成或从单个中端模型五次采样带来的任务准确率提升有限；部分经典双射在零示例时完美解决却在五示例下失败；某些失败源于响应长度预算耗尽导致代码被截断；统计合成远易于映射合成，部分集合准确率趋近于零，长提示导致准确率急剧下降。
AI.conclusion: 大语言模型在精确组合代码合成上的表现仍然脆弱，示例数量非单调地影响性能，响应长度预算构成实际瓶颈，且精确符号规则归纳能力严重不足。这揭示了当前大语言模型在严格形式化推理任务上的根本性局限，并为未来研究方向提供了明确基准。

title: STS-NET: Spatio-Temporal Stress Network for Self-Supervised Crop Stress Detection using Satellite Image Time Series
summary: Early and accurate detection of crop stress is essential to improve agricultural productivity and ensure global food security. However, collecting a large labeled crop stress dataset is a challenging task. To address this challenge, we introduce a novel spatial-temporal stress network (STS-NET), built on a self-supervised 3D-convolutional autoencoder (3D-CAE), designed to utilize Satellite Image Time Series (SITS) data for crop stress detection. STS-NET exploits four vegetation indices: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI), Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (GNDVI), Red-Edge Chlorophyll Index (RECI) and Normalized Difference Red-Edge Index (NDRE) obtained from high resolution Planetscope imagery to capture spatiotemporal stress patterns. The model is trained on our BSPT (Barnala Spatial-Temporal) dataset and evaluated on a real-world sugarcane dataset collected over a year from a 2.5-acre test plot located in Lakhimpur-Kheri (LK) district in Uttar Pradesh in India. STS-NET achieved a precision of 97. 98\% for water stress, 85.08\% for nitrogen stress, and 83.47\% for combined stress. The results demonstrate the potential of STS-NET in effectively detecting stress in sugarcane crops with minimal reliance on labeled data. Furthermore, STS-NET can serve as a robust feature extractor for simpler models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于自监督3D卷积自编码器的时空应力网络（STS-NET），利用Planetscope卫星影像时间序列数据和四种植被指数进行作物胁迫检测，在甘蔗胁迫检测中实现了高精度，显著减少了对标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 早期准确检测作物胁迫对提高农业生产力和保障全球粮食安全至关重要，但大规模标注的作物胁迫数据集收集极具挑战性，现有方法难以在标注数据稀缺的条件下实现有效的胁迫检测。
AI.method: 提出STS-NET网络，基于自监督3D卷积自编码器（3D-CAE）框架，利用高分辨率Planetscope卫星影像时间序列（SITS）数据，提取NDVI、GNDVI、RECI和NDRE四种植被指数以捕捉时空胁迫模式。模型在自建的BSPT（Barnala Spatial-Temporal）数据集上训练，并在印度北方邦Lakhimpur-Kheri地区2.5英亩甘蔗试验田的真实数据集上评估。
AI.result: STS-NET在水胁迫检测上达到了97.98%的精确率，氮胁迫检测上达到85.08%，复合胁迫检测上达到83.47%，展示了在极少标注数据条件下对甘蔗作物胁迫的有效检测能力。
AI.conclusion: STS-NET能够在标注数据有限的情况下有效检测甘蔗作物胁迫，并且可作为鲁棒的特征提取器服务于更简单的下游模型，为基于卫星影像的作物胁迫检测提供了一种低标注依赖的实用方案。

title: When JSON Is Not Enough: Semantic Reliability of Schema-Constrained LLM Ordering Agents
summary: LLM agents are increasingly used as transaction compilers: a user states an intent in natural language, and the model emits a structured object that an API can execute. JSON Schema and provider-level structured-output modes are useful because they remove a large class of parse failures, but they do not by themselves decide whether the object is a safe, faithful transaction. We introduce OrderBench, a deterministic benchmark for restaurant ordering agents that separates syntactic validity, schema validity, status decisions, exact item semantics, constraint preservation, and unsafe acceptances. Across 2,400 Nebius Token Factory calls to four open models in prompt-only and JSON-schema modes, we find that schema-valid output can still have large semantic error rates. In the strongest model, both modes achieve 100% schema validity, yet semantic success remains near 80%; in weaker models, schema-valid unsafe acceptances occur in double digits. The result is a concrete engineering warning: structured output is a necessary interface layer, not a substitute for domain verification and fail-closed execution.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出OrderBench基准测试，用于评估LLM代理在餐厅点餐场景中生成结构化交易的能力，发现即使输出符合JSON Schema，语义错误率和不安全接受率仍然很高，表明结构化输出只是必要接口层，不能替代领域验证和故障关闭执行。
AI.motivation: 现有的JSON Schema和结构化输出模式虽然能够消除大量解析错误，但无法判断生成的结构化对象是否为安全、忠实的交易，即语法有效性不保证语义正确性，目前缺乏一个能够分离语法验证与语义安全评估的基准测试。
AI.method: 作者设计了OrderBench基准测试，该基准专门用于评估餐厅点单代理，从语法有效性、Schema有效性、状态决策、精确商品语义、约束保持和危险接受六个维度对LLM输出进行确定性评估；实验在2,400次Nebius Token Factory调用上对四种开源模型分别在纯提示模式和JSON Schema模式下进行测试。
AI.result: 在最强的模型中，两种模式均达到100%的Schema有效性，但语义成功率仍徘徊在80%附近；在较弱模型中，即使输出符合Schema，不安全接受率仍达到两位数百分比；这表明Schema有效输出仍可能包含较大的语义错误率。
AI.conclusion: 研究结论是，结构化输出是必要的接口层，但绝不能替代领域验证和故障关闭执行机制，这是一个具体的工程警示：依赖结构化输出模式不足以保障交易安全性和忠实性，需要在执行层面施加额外的领域级校验。

title: ZeroSplat: Generalized Referring Segmentation in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Recent advancements in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled language-guided scene understanding. However, existing Referring 3D Gaussian Splatting (R3DGS) methods are fundamentally restricted to single-target queries. To reflect the ambiguity of real-world instructions, we introduce the Generalized Referring 3D Gaussian Splatting Segmentation (GR3DGS) task, which requires dynamically segmenting an arbitrary number of targets (0, 1, or $N$). To facilitate comprehensive evaluation of this new task, we construct two new benchmarks: GR-LERF and GR-ScanNet. Crucially, existing R3DGS paradigms exhibit fundamental technical bottlenecks that severely limit their performance on the GR3DGS task: they lack intrinsic 3D point-level understanding by operating merely on 2D rendered pixels, and they incur prohibitive computational overhead by requiring per-scene optimization to embed heavy semantic features. To dismantle these bottlenecks, we propose ZeroSplat, a novel training-free and zero-feature framework. ZeroSplat lifts 2D Vision-Language Model (VLM) priors into 3D space through robust multi-view geometric constraints. This strategy enables intrinsic point-level understanding without incurring any additional feature storage. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ZeroSplat significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods across generalized and single-target scenarios while maintaining exceptional efficiency. Project Page: https://inkmind-ai.github.io/ZeroSplat

AI.tldr: 针对现有Referring 3DGS方法仅支持单目标查询的局限，本文提出GR3DGS任务并构建新基准，同时提出ZeroShaft——一种无需训练、零特征存储的框架，通过将2D VLM先验经多视图几何约束提升至3D空间，在通用和单目标场景下均显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有Referring 3D Gaussian Splatting (R3DGS) 方法被严格限制在单目标查询场景，无法处理真实世界中含歧义、目标数量可变的指令（0、1或N个目标）。此外，现有R3DGS范式存在两个根本性技术瓶颈：仅基于2D渲染像素操作而缺乏内在的3D点级理解，以及需要逐场景优化来嵌入繁重的语义特征导致计算开销不可接受。
AI.method: 本文提出ZeroShaft，一个完全无需训练且零特征存储的框架。其核心思想是将2D Vision-Language Model (VLM) 先验通过鲁棒的多视图几何约束提升至3D空间，从而在不引入任何额外特征存储的前提下实现内在的点级3D理解。同时，为支撑新任务评估，构建了两个新基准数据集：GR-LERF和GR-ScanNet。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，ZeroShaft在通用场景（任意数量目标的动态分割）和单目标场景下均显著优于现有最先进方法，同时保持了极高的效率。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了现有R3DGS范式在泛化到多目标场景时的根本性局限，并证明通过多视图几何约束将2D VLM先验提升至3D空间是一种无需训练、零额外存储且高效可行的替代方案，为语言引导的3D场景理解提供了新的范式方向。

title: ProbSPARQL: Querying Knowledge Graphs with Multi-dimensional, Uncertain Numeric Data
comment: 18 pages, 5 figures, 1 table. Preprint. Supplementary material and reproducibility artifacts are available online
summary: The SFB 1574 Circular Factory is building a shared knowledge graph infrastructure for integrating data about returned products. A central challenge is that circular-factory data include numeric measurements that (i) originate from sensors or are derived from sensor-based measurements, (ii) are frequently multi-dimensional, and (iii) are inherently uncertain, while downstream triage, validation, reliability-modeling, and reassembly-planning modules require queryable uncertainty representations. Current RDF and SPARQL technologies lack native support for harmonized querying and analysis of such uncertain numeric measurement data. To address this gap, we present ProbSPARQL, an upward-compatible SPARQL extension developed as an early-stage query-layer pilot for this infrastructure. ProbSPARQL models uncertain numeric values as random variables whose distributions are encoded by probabilistic RDF literal datatypes, and supports distribution-aware expressions, probabilistic filters, and divergence-based joins. We implement ProbSPARQL on Apache Jena ARQ and expose it through a Fuseki-compatible execution layer. We assess real-data applicability using project-derived measurement fragments covering GMM-encoded uncertainty and histogram-based empirical roughness distributions, and evaluate scalability separately on controlled ontology-conformant benchmarks with up to 5,000 angle-grinder instances and 1.5M triples. The results show feasible in-engine execution, filter-pushdown speedups over application-layer post-processing, and latency-accuracy trade-offs among divergence-join decision strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ProbSPARQL，一种向上兼容的SPARQL扩展，用于在循环工厂知识图谱中支持不确定数值传感器测量数据的查询与分析，通过将不确定值建模为随机变量并引入概率化RDF字面量数据类型、分布感知表达式、概率化过滤器和散度基连接，实现了引擎内的高效执行与可接受的延迟-精度权衡。
AI.motivation: SFB 1574循环工厂需构建共享知识图谱基础设施以集成返厂产品数据，但其中的传感器数值测量数据具有多维性、来源不确定性及衍生不确定性等特征，下游模块（如分拣、验证、可靠性建模与再装配规划）需要可查询的不确定性表示，而现有RDF和SPARQL技术缺乏对这类不确定数值测量数据的统一查询与分析的原生支持。
AI.method: ProbSPARQL将不确定数值建模为随机变量，其分布由概率化RDF字面量数据类型编码；扩展支持分布感知表达式、概率化过滤器及基于散度的连接操作。实现基于Apache Jena ARQ，并通过兼容Fuseki的执行层对外暴露。
AI.result: 使用项目实际测量片段（含GMM编码不确定性与基于直方图的经验粗糙度分布）评估真实数据适用性，并在受控的本体一致性基准上（多达5,000个角磨机实例与150万三元组）独立评估可扩展性。结果表明可实现引擎内可行执行，相比应用层后处理获得过滤器下推加速，且散度连接决策策略存在延迟-精度权衡。
AI.conclusion: ProbSPARQL在循环工厂知识图谱中为不确定数值测量数据提供了可行的引擎内查询支持，验证了概率化RDF扩展在实际工业场景中的可用性，并揭示了不同连接决策策略在延迟与精度之间的权衡关系，为后续构建可查询不确定性表示的基础设施奠定了基础。

title: OPD-IAD: From Language Judgment to Industrial Anomaly Detection via On-Policy Self-Distillation
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have recently shown strong potential for industrial anomaly detection (IAD) by providing image-level anomaly judgments and interpretable defect reasoning. However, current LVLM-based IAD methods still struggle to produce precise pixel-level anomaly maps from generated language judgments. We aim to achieve precise pixel-level localization while using language as guidance rather than letting it dominate the visual response. Specifically, we propose \textbf{OPD-IAD}, an evidence-privileged dense on-policy self-distillation framework for LVLM-based IAD. OPD-IAD distills privileged defect evidence onto the model's own on-policy judgment trajectory, enabling the final generated judgment to be learned under dense supervision rather than treated only as a textual answer. The resulting judgment serves as a semantic condition for dense anomaly perception. To turn this condition into dense visual evidence, we introduce \textbf{Language-guided Visual Anchoring}, which uses a judgment reforward to re-encode the image and question under the final-judgment condition into semantic anchors and contrasts them with dense visual features through a contrastive heatmap head to generate anomaly maps. The language judgment therefore provides compact semantic guidance, while dense visual features remain the basis for pixel-level scoring, allowing language to guide anomaly localization without letting language quality directly dictate the pixel-level response. Extensive experiments show that OPD-IAD achieves the best overall performance among LVLM-based IAD methods, leading on most image-level, pixel-level, and QA metrics.

AI.tldr: 提出OPD-IAD框架，通过特权证据的在线策略自蒸馏和语言引导视觉锚定，在工业异常检测中实现以语言为语义引导但不主导视觉响应的精确像素级定位，在图像级、像素级和QA指标上均达到LVLM方法最优性能。
AI.motivation: 当前基于大型视觉语言模型(LVLM)的工业异常检测方法能够提供图像级异常判断和可解释缺陷推理，但难以从生成的语言判断中产生精确的像素级异常定位图，语言输出主导了视觉响应而缺乏对视觉特征的精细利用。
AI.method: 提出OPD-IAD框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 证据特权密集在线策略自蒸馏(Evidence-privileged Dense On-policy Self-Distillation)，将特权缺陷证据蒸馏到模型自身的在线策略判断轨迹上，使最终生成判断受到密集监督而非仅作为文本答案；(2) 语言引导视觉锚定(Language-guided Visual Anchoring)，通过判断重前向在最终判断条件下重新编码图像和问题生成语义锚点，并通过对比热力图头与密集视觉特征对比生成异常图，使语言提供紧凑语义引导而像素级评分仍基于视觉特征。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，OPD-IAD在基于LVLM的工业异常检测方法中取得了最优的整体性能，在大多数图像级、像素级和QA评估指标上均领先于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了在LVLM框架下，通过设计合理的自蒸馏和视觉锚定机制，语言可以作为有效的语义引导而不直接主导像素级响应，实现了精确的像素级异常定位，为工业异常检测中语言与视觉的协同提供了新的范式。

title: Wave2Body: Rethinking mmWave Human Pose Estimation as Radar-to-Body Token Translation
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar enables privacy-friendly human sensing, but its sparse point clouds are physical measurements of view-dependent electromagnetic reflections and only indirectly characterize body articulation. Recovering a complete 3D pose from such partial, geometry-dependent observations is therefore under-constrained. Existing methods directly regress joint coordinates from paired radar-pose data, relying on the same limited paired supervision to learn radar perception, human-body structure, and their alignment. This coupling can encourage dataset-specific shortcuts under ambiguous radar observations. We propose Wave2Body, a radar-to-body token translation framework that decouples these learning targets using a self-supervised mmWave tokenizer, a pretrained compositional body tokenizer that defines the output space, and a lightweight translator between them.
